name: Mustard Lancashire Triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6.
2. Mix together the grated cheese, spring onions, and wholegrain mustard.
3. Melt the butter in a small pan.
4. Lay out a sheet of filo pastry on a clean board, brush with melted butter, and place another sheet on top. Repeat so you have a stack of 3 sheets.
5. Do the same with the other three sheets.
6. Cut each stack of pastry into 6 strips, about 3 inches wide.
7. Spoon a little of the filling at the top of each strip, then fold the pastry over at a triangular angle to cover the filling.
8. Continue folding the pastry so you have 12 triangular parcels.
9. Lift onto a baking sheet and brush the tops with melted butter. Sprinkle with poppy seeds and bake for 15 to 20 minutes, until golden and crisp.
